title: Apparatus for quality control of a superconducting tape
assignee: Commonwealth Fusion Systems LLC (BASF/Forschungszentrum Juelich lineage)
status_note: Active, expires 2041-10-25 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: reel-to-reel tape Ic QC via current-injection rolls, staged-temperature contacts
indep_claim_gist: Apparatus: rolls inject current into moving superconducting tape; measuring contacts sense voltage; cooling section keeps injection rolls colder than measurement contacts; supply/receiver spools feed tape 0.1-1000 m/h.
notes: Claims stop at reel-to-reel; no winding-stage claim. Blocks contact-type tape-QC benches to ~2041. JP member JP7186243B2 fetched (same family, priority 2018-04-25). Serves bounding of U-001/U-009.

title: Method of facilitating superconducting tape manufacturing
status_note: Active, expires 2026-12-08 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: tape characterization dataset, position-correlated, distributed with tape to customer
indep_claim_gist: Method: form extended-length superconducting tape; characterize it to create a data set of measurement values correlated to positions along tape length; distribute tape and data set to customer.
notes: THE nearest art to U-009 defect maps: claims creating+shipping the map, silent on consuming it in a winding machine. Displays expiry 2026-12-08 - verify before reliance. Cited-by chase yielded EP3671247A1.

title: Superconducting coil and manufacturing method for superconducting coil
status_note: Active, expires 2040-07-23 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: during-winding groove position detection, winding-guide closed-loop placement control
indep_claim_gist: Manufacturing method: position detector (laser displacement meter or image device) detects winding-groove positions in real time; winding-guide position/orientation controlled from that information while frame rotates to place superconducting wire.
notes: Closest fetched art to during-winding QC - but purely geometric (groove/placement), no electrical/Rc/defect sensing claim. Design-around: electrical QC layer. CPC not captured at fetch. Bounds U-001.

title: Strain- or magnetic field-based quench detection
status_note: Active, expires 2040-11-10 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: pre-quench detection comparing strain/field measurements across multiple HTS coils
indep_claim_gist: Method: monitor strain and/or magnetic field across multiple HTS field coils; compare measurements between coils; declare quench likelihood from deviations from expected patterns; initiate shutdown.
notes: Re-fetched this run per charter (prior-corpus nearest art). Operational monitoring of assembled magnets, 25-country family incl CN114667579B - broad comparative-monitoring language could read on multi-coil test-stand acceptance rigs; no manufacturing/winding claim. U-008/U-022 adjacent.

title: Quench detection in superconducting magnets
status_note: Active, expires 2038-03-27 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: striated HTS sensing tape (series strips) as embedded quench sensor
indep_claim_gist: QD system using dedicated HTS tape whose HTS layer is divided into strips connected in series along an open path, multiplying voltage response ~N-fold; threshold crossing triggers energy dump.
notes: Sensor-tape-co-wound-with-coil concept fenced for QD; does not claim installation-at-winding process or manufacturing QC use. Nearest art for U-026 embedded-sensing-at-winding hypothesis.

title: Continuous critical current measurement apparatus and method of measuring continuous critical current using the same
status_note: Active, expires 2031-07-20 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: wheel-type current/voltage terminals, reel-to-reel continuous Ic in liquid nitrogen
indep_claim_gist: Apparatus: reel-to-reel feeds tape at constant velocity through LN2; rotating wheel-type current terminals and wheel-type voltage terminals contact tape; critical current measured in real time without burnout.
notes: Blocks rolling-contact continuous-Ic benches to ~2031 (US/KR/EP/JP). Tape-level only. Relevant if C33 QC module includes an ingest/rewind Ic bench; design-around: contactless Hall (US6034527A lineage, displays expired).

title: Superconducting coil testing
status_note: Expired - Lifetime as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: in-process defect scan of each coil layer, conductor path re-optimized around defects
indep_claim_gist: Method: during manufacture, scan each superconducting layer to detect defects; optimize/redefine conductor path around them before defining the path and before depositing the next layer; classify repairable vs irreparable.
notes: Conceptual grandfather of defect-aware manufacturing (U-009) - but for deposited/patterned layers, not wound REBCO tape; displays expired. Freedom indicator - verify before reliance.

title: Method for production quality control of flexible superconducting tapes
status_note: Active, expires 2044-05-01 as displayed on GP (long pendency/PTA; anomalous vs 2013 priority - indicative only)
claim_theme: microwave dielectric-resonator monitoring of tape quality during growth/annealing
notes: Attribution corrected vs CS-D lead: this 2025 grant is University of Houston, NOT a tape vendor. In-chamber measurement during deposition; vendor-side, upstream of winding. Priority claimed from US provisional 61/845,020 (2013-07-11), filed 2014-07-10.

title: Quality control of high performance superconductor tapes
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2037-08-29 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: in-line XRD c-axis lattice monitoring in real time during tape deposition
notes: Tape-growth QC (BaMO3 nanocolumn texture via (007)/(101) peaks); vendor-side. Irrelevant to winding-stage claims but maps the crowded tape-QC axis.

title: Method for evaluating the electrical properties of a HTS superconductor
status_note: Withdrawn as displayed on GP; US/JP family status not checked this run; indicative
claim_theme: reel-to-reel in-field (>=1.5 T) Ic evaluation, contacts in low-field zones
notes: Found via US7854057B2 cited-by chase. In-field tape QC (TapeStar-XL-HF-class axis). EP withdrawn - pending US sibling could still grow claims; watch US20200200841A1.

title: Method and measuring apparatus for a contactless longitudinal and transversal homogeneity examination of critical current density in superconductor tape
status_note: Expired - Fee Related (2008) as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: contactless Hall-probe Jc homogeneity scan of tape pulled through 77K cryostat
indep_claim_gist: Apparatus/method: tape pulled continuously at 77 K through magnet gap; stationary Hall probes read screening-field profile; longitudinal+transverse Jc homogeneity mapped over km lengths for automatic quality control.
notes: TapeStar-class foundational art, KIT lineage; displays expired 2008 - verify before reliance. Oldest blocking-art family of the cluster; anchors expiry-horizon read.

title: Apparatus for measurement of critical current in superconductive tapes
assignee: Triad National Security LLC (orig. University of California)
status_note: Expired - Lifetime (2020-10-13) as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: localized-field Ic suppression with sliding voltage taps, position-indexed tape testing
notes: National-lab art; position-locating means anticipates position-indexed tape data. Displays expired - verify before reliance.

title: Superconducting coil protection method and superconducting magnet device
assignee: National Institute for Materials Science; Japan Superconductor Technology Inc
status_note: Expired - Fee Related (2021-01-10) as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: screening-field magnitude (measured minus theoretical field) triggers current derating
notes: Operational protection via thickness-direction field measurement; measured-vs-model deviation logic is the same math a coil-QC signature system would use - US member displays expired, JP/EP siblings not status-checked.

title: Quench protection in high-temperature superconducting magnets
status_note: Active, expires 2041-01-14 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: bypass resistance bridging HTS coil joint for quench energy dumping
notes: No manufacturing/QC claims (confirmed at fetch). CPC includes G01K11/32 (fiber-optic temperature) - TE fences fiber-adjacent protection. WO2018078327A1 same lineage per citation in US11749434B2; family linkage not confirmed this run.

title: High temperature superconductor field coil
status_note: Granted 2026-04-07 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: HTS coil manufacture: wind tapes, then trim material from axial tape edges
notes: Evidence of TE nationalizing manufacturing-method claims INTO CN (WO/EP/JP/KR/US family). Not a QC claim; shows Western fusion filers fencing CN coil-manufacture space while domestic CN winding-QC filings are absent.

title: Tension-controllable critical current measurement device for superconducting tape
title_zh: 一种张力可控的超导带材临界电流测量装置
assignee: 洛阳理工学院 (Luoyang Institute of Science and Technology)
status_note: Expired - Fee Related (terminated 2018-11-04) as displayed on GP; CN utility model, 10y max term; indicative
cpc: force measurement (as displayed; specific code not shown)
claim_theme: LN2 four-wire Ic rig with tension-regulated tape transport, over/under-tension alarms
notes: Only CN filing found joining TENSION control to Ic measurement - tape-level bench, lapsed after 2 years. Listed invention sibling CN107505493A/B not status-checked this run. Nearest CN art for tension-to-Rc QC (U-001/U-007 seam).

title: Method for measuring critical current characteristics of high-temperature superconducting tape
title_zh: 一种高温超导带材临界电流特性的测量方法
assignee: 中国电力科学研究院 (CEPRI); State Grid Corp of China
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2028-11-25 as displayed on GP; indicative
cpc: superconductor testing by magnetic means (as displayed; specific codes not shown)
claim_theme: four-wire Ic vs temperature (64-77K), field magnitude and angle, rotatable holder
notes: CN grid-institute tape-metrology method; sample-level, not production QC. One of the few live CN filings in the cluster (to 2028 displayed).

title: Superconducting coil quench detection method
title_zh: 一种超导线圈失超检测方法
assignee: 中国科学院电工研究所 (Institute of Electrical Engineering, CAS)
status_note: Expired - Fee Related (terminated 2016-09-28) as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: temperature-rise-rate threshold quench detection, ms sampling, LTS+HTS
notes: CAS-IEE method art; displays lapsed 2016. CN institute QD filings exist but fee-lapse quickly - pattern relevant to CN filing-strategy read.

title: Superconducting magnet quench protection device
title_zh: 一种超导磁体失超保护装置
assignee: 中国科学院电工研究所 (Institute of Electrical Engineering, CAS)
status_note: Expired - Fee Related (terminated 2025-05-23) as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: per-coil heaters, diode stages, voltage sensors, electronic-switch quench energy spreading
notes: MRI/NMR-oriented protection electronics; displays lapsed 2025. Confirms CN QD art is device-protection, not manufacturing QC.

title: Self-monitoring superconducting tape via integrated optical fibers
status_note: Active, expires 2038-02-06 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: optical fiber integrated lengthwise in HTS tape for distributed Rayleigh sensing
indep_claim_gist: Tape structure: HTS insert with metal stabilizer plus optical fiber(s) integrated lengthwise within/alongside conductor; Rayleigh-backscatter interrogation gives distributed temperature/strain (5 mm, 30 ms class) for quench detection.
notes: Fences fiber-IN-tape architecture (U-026 nearest art). Does not claim fiber installation during coil winding, cryo calibration workflow, or trigger-rated interrogator products.

title: Operator and manufacturing quality traceability
assignee: Toyota Motor Engineering & Manufacturing North America Inc
status_note: Active, expires 2036-11-22 as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: generic factory traceability: operator auth, quality validation, part ID marking, reports
notes: Generic-manufacturing nearest art for U-011/U-027 birth-certificate hypothesis; not coil- or superconductor-specific. G05B19/41875 = quality-surveillance factory control (definition displayed at fetch).

title: Method and system for precise traceability of process quality anomalies
title_zh: 一种工艺流程质量异常精准追溯方法及系统
assignee: 北京科技大学 (University of Science and Technology Beijing)
status_note: Active as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: knowledge-data fusion quality-anomaly tracing across process subsystems (steel rolling)
notes: CN nearest art for process-quality traceability methods; steel/nonferrous scope, no superconductor or coil claim. Bounds U-011 traceability whitespace on the CN side.
